scripts.dev:browser:postgres: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --runtime-target browser --deployment-profile standalone
scripts.dev:browser:postgres:standalone: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --runtime-target browser --deployment-profile standalone
scripts.dev:desktop:postgres: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --runtime-target desktop --deployment-profile standalone
scripts.dev:desktop:postgres:standalone: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --runtime-target desktop --deployment-profile standalone
scripts.test:phase2-readiness: node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none scripts/verify-knowledgebase-phase2-readiness.test.mjs && node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none scripts/verify-knowledgebase-tenant-quota.test.mjs && pnpm test:multi-tenant-isolation && pnpm test:billing-metering
scripts.test:frontend: pnpm --dir apps/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc/packages/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc-commons test && pnpm --dir apps/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc/packages/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc-core test && pnpm --dir apps/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc/packages/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc-search test && pnpm --dir apps/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc/packages/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc-knowledgebase test && pnpm --dir apps/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc/packages/sdkwork-knowledgebase-pc-shell test
scripts.api:materialize: node tools/align-knowledgebase-openapi-standard.mjs && node scripts/align-app-api-int64-string-fields.mjs && node tools/apply-knowledgebase-openapi-auth-mode.mjs && node tools/apply-knowledgebase-openapi-permissions.mjs && node sdks/standardize-knowledgebase-sdk-family.mjs && node tools/materialize-apis-authority.mjs
scripts.api:materialize:check: node tools/align-knowledgebase-openapi-standard.mjs --check && node scripts/align-app-api-int64-string-fields.mjs --check && node tools/apply-knowledgebase-openapi-auth-mode.mjs --check && node tools/apply-knowledgebase-openapi-permissions.mjs --check && node sdks/standardize-knowledgebase-sdk-family.mjs --check && node tools/materialize-apis-authority.mjs --check
scripts._sdkwork:test: pnpm topology:validate && pnpm test:topology && pnpm test:frontend && pnpm test:rust && pnpm test:smoke && pnpm test:launch-readiness && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:observability && pnpm test:security && pnpm db:validate
scripts._sdkwork:check: pnpm api:materialize:check && pnpm check:architecture-alignment && pnpm check:app-composition && pnpm check:pc-app-hygiene && pnpm check:source-hygiene && pnpm check:utils-integration && pnpm check:pnpm-script-standard && pnpm check:agent-workflow-standard && pnpm check:okf-standard && pnpm check:external-engine-catalog && pnpm check:knowledge-engine-spi && pnpm check:verification-pipeline
scripts._sdkwork:verify: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/verify_phase1.ps1 && pnpm check && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:observability && pnpm test:launch-readiness && pnpm test:phase2-readiness && pnpm gateway:validate:cloud && pnpm run check:app-composition
scripts._sdkwork:clean: cargo clean && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const dir of ['artifacts','target']) { if (fs.existsSync(dir)) fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true,force:true}); }"
scripts.dev:browser:cloud: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --runtime-target browser --deployment-profile cloud
